trades.sentiment_summary: Recent news highlights institutional investors like Fjarde AP Fonden increasing their Ford stakes significantly, alongside positive analyst actions such as UBS and TD Cowen raising price targets to $15 and Zacks issuing a Strong Buy rating with upward EPS revisions[1][3]. Ford is reportedly in talks with BYD for hybrid batteries to enhance flexibility amid softer EV demand, while its Europe strategy shows narrowing losses to $52 million in Q3 2025[1][3]. Analyst consensus remains Hold with modest price targets around $13-14, amid recent stock price declines[1][2].

Omnicom has closed its acquisition of Interpublic Group (IPG) for a final purchase price of $9 billion in an all-stock deal, creating a combined company with over $25 billion in annual revenue, surpassing rival Publicis Group.[1][7] The deal received final EU regulatory approval, marking the completion of the merger first announced earlier.[1][2] No other significant IPG-specific news appears in the last 24 hours.[2]
